description:
The term "yoga" comes from a Sanskrit word meaning "union." Yoga combines physical exercises, mental meditation, and breathing techniques to strengthen the muscles and relieve stress. To throw a spotlight on the use of  Yoga and its importance, A Special demonstration film on yoga has been produced by the Department of Film and Television Production of Subbalakshmi Lakshmipathy College of Science, Madurai

🎓 Welcome to the SAMS - School of Animation and Media Studies! 🎬

At our esteemed institution, we are dedicated to nurturing creative minds and empowering the next generation of visual storytellers. Explore our diverse array of cutting-edge programs designed to unleash your artistic potential towards a successful career in the dynamic world of animation, game design, development, VFX, and film production.

🌟 Programmes Offered:
1. B.Sc. Animation (Game Design and Development Specialization)
2. B.Sc. Animation (Visual Effects and Film Production Specialization)
3. M.Sc. Visual Communication
4. PG Diploma in Animation Techniques

🖌️ Dive into the World of Animation and learn the art of bringing characters, stories to life through state-of-the-art technology and industry-leading techniques.

🎮 Embark on a journey into the realm of Game Design and Development, where creativity meets innovation, and turn your passion for gaming into a lucrative career.

💥 Unleash your imagination in the realm of VFX, where you'll master the tools and techniques to create stunning Visual Effects that captivate audiences worldwide.

🎥 Immerse yourself in the art of Film Production and learn the ins and outs of every aspect of Filmmaking, from script to screen.

🔍 Connect with us:
Website: https://slcs.edu.in/service/b-sc-animation/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AnimationSLCS/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/animationslcs/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/school-of-animation-and-media-studies-sams-slcs/

Join our college of aspiring artists, collaborate with industry professionals, and embark on a journey of creativity and innovation like never before. Enrol today and let your imagination soar with the School of Animation and Media Studies! ✨

#Animation #GameDesign #VFX #FilmProduction #CreativeEducation #VisualStorytelling #ArtisticExpression #SAMS #SLCS #SLCSMadurai #GameDevelopment
